---
name: Security Issue (Non-Sensitive)
about: Report a non-sensitive security concern — dependency, configuration, or hardening
  suggestion
title: "[SECURITY]"
labels: security
assignees: NOMSVentures
type: Bug

---

> **This template is for non-sensitive security topics only** — dependency vulnerabilities, configuration hardening suggestions, or general security improvements.
>
> **If you have found a vulnerability that could be exploited, do NOT use this template.**
> Report it privately per the process in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
>
> **If you have found exposed PHI or credentials, contact an org administrator immediately.**
> Do not open any issue.

---

## Type of Security Concern

- [ ] Outdated or vulnerable dependency
- [ ] Security hardening suggestion
- [ ] Misconfiguration (non-exploitable)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Affected Repository

Which repo does this apply to?

---

## Description

<!-- Describe the concern. No sensitive details, no reproduction steps for vulnerabilities. -->

---

## Suggested Remediation

<!-- If you have a suggestion for how to address this, include it here. -->

---

## Compliance Confirmation

- [ ] This issue does not contain exploitable vulnerability details.
- [ ] This issue does not contain PHI, patient data, or credentials.
